extraction.description: This screenshot shows the UiPath 'Add project' dialog, likely within Maestro or a related project selection interface. A list of available projects is displayed on the left, and the project '2WM Validation App IXP Template' is selected, with its details shown in the right-side panel including collaborator, status, and last modified time. The Add button is available in the bottom-right corner to confirm adding the selected project.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Select the checkbox for the project '2WM Validation App IXP Template'.
2. Review the project details in the right-side panel to confirm the correct project is selected.
3. Click on the 'Add' button in the bottom-right corner.
